---
title: "Nini Longoria"
subtitle: "Mixed-Methods Research Scientist"
description: "Radancy"
image: avatar.jpg
group: alumni
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)


:::

## About

Former MaRSS Lab graduate student. 


## Contact

- {{< fa linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ninilongoria/)
- {{< fa brands google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MtxQRCQAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)
